description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named tests that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests. The workflow has two jobs: python-tests-pr for non-merged pull requests and python-tests-merged for merged pull requests or pushes to master. Both jobs run on ubuntu-latest, check out the repository, set up Python, install dependencies, install The Walrus, run pytest with coverage, and upload coverage to Codecov. The python-tests-merged job uses a matrix strategy to test on multiple OS and Python versions.
